mac-n-cheez-adapted-from-sweetie-pies.name: Mac-n-cheez (adapted From Sweetie Pie's)
instructions: Sprinkle salt into a large pot of water; bring to a boil. Cook elbow macaroni in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until tender yet firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. Drain.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 4-quart baking dish with cooking spray.
Pour hot macaroni into the baking dish. Add butter; stir until melted.
Whisk evaporated milk, milk, eggs, and sour cream together in a large bowl. Season with sugar, pepper, and salt.
Sprinkle Colby Jack cheese, processed cheese food, and Cheddar cheese over macaroni. Pour milk mixture on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is lightly browned, 30 to 45 minutes.

mackerel-dip.name: Mackerel Dip
instructions: Remove and discard mackerel skin and bones. In a medium bowl, mix mackerel with onion and hot pepper sauce with a fork, breaking it into small pieces. Mix in mayonnaise, then season to taste with salt and pepper. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.

magic-cepe-mushroom-soup.name: Magic Cèpe Mushroom Soup

ingredients.item: Extra-virgin olive oil or chive oil
An electric spice mill; a small jar with a lid; a large jar with a lid; a 3-quart heavy-duty saucepan with a lid; 8 warmed

instructions: Coarsely chop the dried mushrooms or cut them into pieces with scissors. Working in batches, grind them to a fine powder in the spice mill. [Makes 1/2 cup (8 tablespoons) powder.]

If time permits, combine the cream and 2 tablespoons mushroom powder in a jar, seal, and refrigerate for 24 hours to infuse the cream with the mushroom flavor and aroma. (Alternatively, combine the cream and mushroom powder in the heavy-duty saucepan, bring just to a simmer, cover, remove from the heat, and set aside for 30 minutes to infuse the cream.)
At serving time, in heavy-duty saucepan, combine the infused cream, salt, and stock and bring to a gentle simmer over medium heat. Remove from the heat and taste for seasoning.
Serve in the warmed soup bowls, garnished with chives and a drizzle of oil.
The soup can be prepared up to 3 days in advance and stored in airtight containers in the refrigerator.
Add sliced raw domestic or wild mushrooms to the soup and cook for several minutes; add grilled, sliced fresh cèpes or domestic mushrooms; add truffle matchsticks at serving time.

magical-unicorn-poop-meringues.name: Magical Unicorn Poop Meringues
instructions: Preheat the oven to 102°C (102 degrees C). Cover 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.

Beat egg whites, vanilla extract, and cream of tartar in a glass, metal, or ceramic bowl with an electric mixer on high speed until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form. Test the mixture between 2 fingers to make sure all of the sugar has dissolved. If still gritty, continue to beat until smooth.
Spoon egg white mixture into a piping bag. Drop in food coloring, spacing the 3 colors evenly apart and pushing them down the sides of the bag with a butter knife.

Pipe mixture onto the prepared baking sheets into 1 1/2-inch 'poop'-shaped spirals. Space them close together, as the spirals will not expand. Add more color to the piping bag if meringues start to look too pale. Sprinkle edible glitter over meringues.
Bake in the preheated oven until dry and set, about 2 hours.

make-juicy-beef-wire-with-peppers-comede.name: Make Juicy Beef Wire With Peppers
make-juicy-beef-wire-with-peppers-comede.original_name: Haz un jugoso alambre de res con pimientos

ingredients.item: 250 gr de filete de res (arrachera o lomo) (en tiras delgadas )
2 cdas de aceite de oliva  (extra virgen)
2 cdas de salsa de soya ( baja en sodio)
50 gr de queso oaxaca o mozzarella deshebrado
4 tortillas of maize or flour (to be accompanied)

instructions: place the meat in a bowl and put with soya sauce, paprika, cumin, minced garlic, salt and pepper. Let rest 20 minutes in cooling.
Heat a large frying pan or plate with high heat, add a tablespoon of olive oil and seal the meat for about 3 minutes till it's golden but juicy. Withdrawal and reserve.
In the same frying pan, add the other tablespoon of oil and pat the peppers and onion with medium heat - high for 5 minutes until they are slightly caramelized but still crispy.
Reintegrate the meat and mix everything. If jalapeno is used, add it at this point.
Bajar el fuego, espolvorear el queso sobre la mezcla y tapar por 1 minuto para que se funda.
Serve hot, sprinkle with fresh cilantro and with tortillas and lemon cuts.

malaga-salad-with-tuna-and-orange-pequer.name: Malaga Salad With Tuna And Orange
malaga-salad-with-tuna-and-orange-pequer.original_name: Ensalada malagueña con atún y naranja

ingredients.item: 2 big potatoes or 6 small baked potatoes
2 cans of tuna in olive oil

instructions: Una vez cocidas las patatas con piel, pelamos y cortamos en trozos.
The orange we peel "to the living," that's to say, eliminating anything else from the white, and we scrape it. The juice that comes out of the orange as you peel it as well.
We peel the onions and we cut them into very fine julian, and we peel them and cut them into "shingles."
We add the tuna cans and some green olives to which we remove the bone.
Para hacer la vinagreta, picamos algunas aceitunas y emulsionamos con aceite de oliva virgen extra, sal y vinagre.
Aderezamos con la vinagreta y mezclamos bien. Dejamos reposar para que se intensifiquen los sabores.
Ponemos la ensalada en una fuente y decoramos con unos gajos de naranja.

malasadas-de-sao-miguel-teleculinaria.name: Malasadas De São Miguel
instructions: Wipe the flour with a pinch of salt and make it a hole in the middle. Dissolve yeast in warm milk, lie in the hole and, using your hands, mix with flour.
Add the orange juice, sugar and brandy, stir, gather the eggs, one at a time, and knead well. Allow to leave at a mild temperature for about 2 to 3 hours.
After the time indicated, grease your hands with oil and mold small balls of dough, with about 60 g each.
Stretch the pasta balls with your hands and fry them in a hot oil pot on both sides. Put them on absorbent paper, sprinkle with a mixture of sugar and cinnamon and serve.

malaysian-flatbread-roti-canai-with-curr.name: Malaysian Flatbread (roti Canai) With Curried Lentil Dip
instructions: Combine bread flour, sugar, kosher salt, egg, melted butter, and water for roti canai in a mixing bowl. Mix with your hands until a shaggy dough forms. Transfer to a work surface and knead until a smooth, elastic dough forms, about 7 minutes.
Divide dough into 8 equal pieces and form each one into a ball. Coat each ball with vegetable oil, transfer to a plate, and cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for 8 hours, to overnight.

Melt butter for dip in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Add onion, ginger, garlic, kosher salt, curry powder, paprika, cumin, black pepper, and cayenne pepper; stir together and saute until onion has softened and spices are fragrant, 3 to 4 minutes. Stir in tomato paste and cook until it starts to toast and caramelize on the bottom of the pan, about 3 minutes.

Stir in cold water and coconut milk. Add lentils; stir and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until tender, about 40 minutes. Taste and adjust seasonings. Reduce heat to low and keep warm while you prepare the roti canai.

Place 1/4 cup melted butter in a bowl. Transfer rested dough balls onto a lightly oiled work surface. Flatten each ball slightly and rub a little melted butter on top. Cover dough with plastic wrap and let it warm up slightly, about 10 minutes.

Press on top of the plastic wrap to flatten warmed dough. Remove plastic wrap and add a bit more butter. Stretch each piece from the center out to get it as thin as possible (until almost see-through), adding more butter as needed. Don't worry if there are a few small tears.

Sprinkle on more melted butter, then pull two sides in towards the center until touching and overlapping slightly. Pull the other two edges in the same way to form a square. Cover with plastic wrap and flatten roti canai one more time.

Add some melted butter to a skillet set over medium or medium-low heat. Add roti canai and cook until browned, flaky, and crispy on the outside and fully cooked through on the inside, 3 to 4 minutes per side.
Remove from the skillet and smush it with your hands to fluff it up and separate the layers of dough. Repeat to cook remaining roti canai.
Sprinkle the curried red lentil dip with cilantro and sliced serrano peppers and serve alongside the roti canai.

mama-roses-apple-dumplings.name: Mama Rose's Apple Dumplings
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a square baking pan with nonstick spray.

Pour melted butter into a bowl; add sugar, flour, and cinnamon for dumplings and whisk until fully combined with the butter. Toss apples in mixture to coat; add 2 tablespoons warm water and mix to combine.
Gently stretch out the biscuits one at a time until they're large enough to fit 1 tablespoon apple mixture. Be careful not to stretch them too thin, you don't want the dough to break.
Add 1 heaping tablespoon apple mixture to the center of each stretched-out biscuit. Gently tuck the dough around the mixture to seal each dumpling into a ball shape.
Line up the dumplings with the seal facing down. Use a sharp knife to slice a tiny slit into the top of each dumpling to allow them to vent while cooking.
Bake in the preheated oven until nearly golden brown, 15 to 25 minutes.

While dumplings are baking, melt butter for sauce in a medium saucepan over medium-low. Slowly sprinkle flour into the butter, whisking the entire time. Add water and stir to combine. Remove from heat. Whisk in sugar and vanilla extract.
Remove dumplings from the oven and pour sauce on top. Continue to bake until the edges of the corner dumplings start to brown and pull away from the sides of the pan, 5 to 6 minutes more.

maple-pots-de-creme-with-almond-praline.name: Maple Pots De Crème With Almond Praline
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C. Scatter almonds on small rimmed baking sheet. Bake almonds until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Remove from oven. Push almonds together in 4-inch square on sheet and cool.

Stir sugar, 1 tablespoon water, corn syrup, and coarse salt in small heavy saucepan over low heat until sugar dissolves. Increase heat; boil without stirring until syrup is dark amber, occasionally swirling pan and brushing down sides with wet pastry brush, about 5 minutes. Immediately pour caramel evenly over almonds, coating completely. Let stand until cold and hard, about 30 minutes. Break praline into pieces or process to coarse crumbs. DO AHEAD Can be made 4 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 163°C. Arrange four 3/4-cup ramekins or custard cups in 13x9x2-inch metal baking pan. Whisk yolks, both sugars, extract, and salt in medium bowl to blend. Gradually whisk in cream. Divide custard among ramekins. Pour enough hot water into baking pan to come halfway up sides of ramekins.
Bake custards until center is just set, about 35 minutes. Transfer to work surface; let stand 15 minutes. Chill uncovered until cold, at least 2 hours. Cover; chill overnight.
Sprinkle praline over custards.

maple-syrup-soaked-doughnut-holes.name: Maple Syrup-soaked Doughnut Holes

ingredients.item: Granulated maple sugar or white sugar plus more for yeast
All-purpose flour plus more for surface

instructions: Heat milk, cream, and 1 Tbsp. water in a small saucepan until an instant-read thermometer registers 110°–115°. Transfer to a small bowl and stir in a pinch of sugar. Sprinkle yeast over. Let stand until foamy, about 10 minutes.

Using an electric mixer, beat remaining 1/3 cup sugar and eggs in a large bowl until pale and foamy, about 3 minutes. Gently stir in yeast mixture and melted butter. Add 2 cups flour and salt; stir until a very soft dough forms.

Cover bowl with a clean kitchen towel. Let dough rise in a warm, draft-free area until doubled, about 1 1/2 hours. (Alternatively, cover bowl loosely with plastic wrap and allow dough to rise for 8 hours in the refrigerator.)

Punch down dough and knead several turns in bowl; form into a ball. Transfer to a generously floured work surface. Sprinkle dough with flour and roll out to 1/2" thickness. Cut out doughnut holes with cookie cutter. Transfer to a floured baking sheet. Cover with a kitchen towel and let rest for 20 minutes.

Pour syrup into a large bowl. Attach deep-fry thermometer to the side of a large pot; pour in oil to a depth of 2" and heat over medium heat until thermometer registers 350°. Working in batches, fry doughnuts, stirring gently with a slotted spoon to keep doughnuts rotating, until golden brown, about 2 minutes per batch. Using slotted spoon, transfer doughnuts to bowl of maple syrup; let soak, turning as more doughnuts are added, until doughnuts absorb syrup, about 15 minutes.

maria-cookie-cake-recipe-comedera.name: Maria Cookie Cake Recipe
maria-cookie-cake-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de tarta de galletas Maria fácil

ingredients.item: 1  sobre de natilla de vainilla ((puedes usar otro de chocolate si prefieres))

instructions: Do each of the plate sachets, each in their respective pot as instructed at the back of the package. Let them stand about 5-10 minutes, they should not be completely cold because they start to solidify and that's not the idea.

He looks for a profound container that serves as a mold, can be a plate, salad, or any profound crockery (look at the example photo). That's how you put a bed of Maria's cookies as you can see in the picture.
Seguidamente, con una cuchara, agrega natilla de chocolate hasta que cubra esta primera capa de galletas Maria.

Reput more cookies and put them back and put them back and put them back and forth and we'll have them back and forth and we'll have them put them back and put them back and put them back and put them back and put them back and put them back and put them back and put them back and put them back into them.
Constantly unchanged: cookies, one-flavour natula, biscuits, another flavour natula until you get to the top of the bowl. The last cape should be chocolate:)
Put the cake in the refrigerator. When cold, enjoy.

mariettas-white-chocolate-macadamia-bisc.name: Marietta's White Chocolate Macadamia Biscotti
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease a cookie sheet or line with parchment paper.

Beat sugar and butter together in a large bowl until fluffy. Beat in eggs, amaretto, and vanilla. Whisk flour, baking powder, and salt together in a separate bowl; stir into butter mixture. Fold in macadamia nuts and white chocolate chips.
Divide dough into 4 equal parts. Place dough parts on the prepared cookie sheet; form each into a log about 14-inches long and 1 1/2-inches wide.
Bake in the preheated oven until very lightly brown, about 25 minutes. Cool and cut diagonally into 1/2-inch slices. Arrange slices on the baking sheet; bake until golden brown, about 8 minutes.

marinated-lamb-wrap-lezzet.name: Marinated Lamb Wrap
instructions: 1. Mix all necessary materials for sea in one container.
2. Wrap the lamb bud with this mixture and stretch film thoroughly.
3. Place it in the oven container that you lubricate after rest 2-3 hours in the refrigerator.
4. chop the shells of potatoes.
5. Take potatoes, carrots and onions in the oven container.
6. Spread fresh thyme leaves on it.
7. Cover with aluminum foil and cook in the oven, which is pre-heated to 180 degrees.
8. Serve hot.

marinated-tofu-with-peanuts-and-charred-.name: Marinated Tofu With Peanuts And Charred Bean Sprouts
instructions: Place tofu on a baking sheet lined with several layers of paper towels; place several layers of paper towels on top and press gently to squeeze out liquid. Cut tofu into ¾”-wide pieces and place in a baking dish.
Whisk jalapeño, soy sauce, brown sugar, and ginger in a small bowl, pour over tofu, and toss to coat. Let sit at least 30 minutes.
Just before serving, heat oil in a medium skillet over medium-high heat. Add 1 cup bean sprouts and cook, undisturbed, until charred, about 3 minutes; season with salt.
Spoon tofu over rice and top with charred and raw bean sprouts, scallions, peanuts, and mint. Serve with lime wedges.
DO AHEAD: Tofu can be marinated 1 hour ahead.

marzipan-potatoes.name: Marzipan Potatoes
instructions: Place almonds in a heat-proof bowl and cover with boiling water. Let stand for a few minutes until cool enough to handle. Slip the almonds out of their skins one by one, leaving the remaining almonds in the warm water. Drain almonds in a colander and pat dry with paper towels.

Place almonds, confectioners' sugar, rose water, and almond extract in a food processor fitted with a metal blade and process to a paste. Scrape the sides a few times to ensure even processing. Process marzipan until it is smooth and no longer grainy. Wrap in plastic wrap and store marzipan in a cool, dry place, 8 hours to overnight.
Shape marzipan into a 1/2-inch thick roll. Cut into 1/2-inch pieces and roll each piece into a ball. Dredge balls in cocoa.

meat-ravioli-with-tomato-pequerecetas.name: Meat Ravioli With Tomato

ingredients.item: 400 g de harina de trigo (aproximadamente 3 tazas)
500 g de carne picada (preferiblemente mezcla de cerdo y ternera)
800 g de tomates triturados (1 lata grande o tomates frescos pelados y triturados)
A handful of fresh basil, minced
1 teaspoon of sugar (optional to balance acidity)

instructions: Sprinkle some flour onto the surface to prevent the mass from gluing. In a big bowl, sig the flour with the salt. Fold the steamed flour onto the work surface and make a hole at the centre, as a volcano. It breaks the eggs at room temperature directly at the centre of the flour volcano and adds olive oil. With a fork, start beating the eggs and oil gently. A little by little, get the flour from the edges back to the centre and make sure that the fluids don't crumble. Once an egg and flour mixture starts to integrate and form a sticky mass, it's time to start chewing with your hands. Stretch strongly for about 10 minutes, till mass is soft, elastic and homogenous. If the dough's too sticky, you can add some more flour and if it's too dry, some water. It forms a ball with the dough and wraps it with clear film. Let him put up at room temperature for 30 minutes. That rest is crucial as it allows glutan to relax, and that will facilitate the stretching of the mass without breaking. After rest, the mass should be easier to handle and less elastic while stretching. That indicates that she's ready to be stretched and filled.

In a bowl, it combines minced meat with onion, garlic, parmesan cheese, parsley, nutmeg, salt and pepper. Be sure to mingle the onion and garlic as thin as possible to guarantee a uniform cooking inside the ravioli. Mix well till all ingredients are integrated.

Divide the resting mass into two equal parts to manage it more easily. It works each part separately, keeping the other cover to avoid its drying. It uses a roller or a dough machine to stretch the dough until it's very thin. The dregadez of mass is important if ravioli isn't to be too thick or heavy at eating. Sprinkle some flour onto the work surface and stretched mass to prevent them from gluing.
It puts pilling montons onto one of the mass sheets, leaving enough space between them to cut and seal ravioli without problems.

Take another mass sheet and place it carefully onto the padding montons. Gently press around the pilling to remove the trapped air, that could expand during cooking and cause ravioli to break. Use your fingers or a fork to press and seal the edges of each ravioli. Be sure they are well sealed to prevent the filling from escaping while cooking. If necessary, you can tap some water between the mass layers to help seal them better.
Utiliza un cortador de ravioli, un cortador de pizza, o incluso un cuchillo afilado para cortar los ravioli en la forma deseada. Los cortadores de ravioli a menudo sellan y cortan al mismo tiempo.

If you aren't going to cook ravioli right away, put them on a plate with flour and make sure they don't touch each other to stop them from gluing. You can refrigerate them if you're cooking them on the same day, or frying them on the plate and then transferring them to a frozen bag to store them for longer.

In a large frying pan, it heats up a few tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat. Add minced onion and garlic and damper them until clear and fringe, and this should take about 5 minutes. Fold the crushed tomatoes into the frying pan with onions and garlic. Add salt and pepper to your taste. If tomatoes have a very acid flavour, you can balance this with a teaspoon of sugar. It incorporates a handful of fresh basil, minced. Reduce fire to low and let the salsa cook at low heat for at least 20 minutes. Revolves occasionally to make sure that the salsa does not stick at the bottom of the frying pan. After 20 minutes, try the sauce and tighten salt, pepper or sugar as necessary. The consistency of the salsa should be sufficiently thick to stick to ravioli without being too clear.
It cooks ravioli with boiling water with salt till they float to the surface, indicating that they are cooked, which usually takes about 4 minutes.
Once cooked, drain ravioli and mix them with tomato sauce. Serves hot.

meatball-ravioli-pasta-lezzet.name: Meatball Ravioli Pasta
instructions: 1. A good choice among practical recipes.
2. Wash the spinach and shore.
3. Cook and drain in boiling water.
4. Crush until it comes to getting to the kitchen robot and become pure.

meatball-soup-with-beef-stew-vibes.name: Meatball Soup With Beef Stew Vibes

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Combine 1 large egg, 4 garlic cloves, finely grated, 1 cup panko, 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, 1 Tbsp. thyme leaves, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ cup water in a medium bowl; season with freshly ground pepper and mix well. Let sit 5 minutes to hydrate.
Add 1 lb. ground beef to bowl and gently mix until combined. Divide and roll meat mixture into ping-pong-size balls (you should have about 20 total).

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil over medium-high in a Dutch oven or other heavy, large pot. Cook meatballs, shaking pot to turn meatballs every few minutes, until browned all over, 6–8 minutes. Using tongs or a slotted spoon, transfer meatballs to a plate.

Cook 1 (packed) cup frozen, thawed pearl onions and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in same pot, stirring occasionally, until slightly softened, about 2 minutes. Add 10 oz. mushrooms (any kind), torn into bite-size pieces, and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned, about 5 minutes. Add 2 Tbsp. double-concentrated tomato paste and cook, stirring often, until mushrooms are coated and paste is slightly darkened in color, about 1 minute. Evenly sprinkle 1 Tbsp. all-purpose flour over and cook, stirring constantly, until mushrooms are coated, about 1 minute.

Pour ²⁄₃ cup dry red wine into pot and cook, scraping up browned bits stuck to bottom of pot, until almost completely evaporated, 1–2 minutes. Stir in 1 lb. Yukon Gold potatoes (about 4 medium), peeled, cut into 1" pieces, then add meatballs, 4 cups low-sodium beef broth, and remaining 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt; season with pepper. Increase heat to high and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover pot, and simmer soup, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are fork-tender, 15–20 minutes.
Remove lid and stir in ½ cup frozen peas; continue to simmer until liquid is reduced just slightly, about 5 minutes.
Ladle soup into bowls and serve with country-style bread if desired.

ingredients.item: 500 grams of bird dana or lamb meat
1 cup of water or broth  u

For a lighter option, the turkey meat can be preferred.
Vejetaryen version can be designed by adding for meatless, or nohut.

2. Add the ad meat and roast to the fire, the color is turned.

melt-in-your-mouth-cocoa-crack-cookie-re.name: Melt-in-your-mouth Cocoa Crack Cookie Recipe
instructions: 1. Take a deep Steak eggs and powder sugar, as the sugar melt rub.

meringue.name: Meringue
instructions: In a small saucepan, combine water, 2 tablespoons sugar, and cornstarch. Cook over low heat until clear, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.

In a large glass or metal bowl, beat egg whites, cream of tartar, and salt until mixture is foamy. Mix in vanilla, then gradually add the 6 tablespoons sugar, beating constantly until meringue forms soft peaks. Gradually pour in cornstarch mixture, beating until stiff. Spread over top of pie and seal to the crust. Brown in oven if desired.

mexican-blackened-corn.name: Mexican Blackened Corn
instructions: Cook bacon in a large, deep skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate. When cool, chop bacon; set aside.

Place corn kernels in a large skillet over high heat; season with cumin, sea salt, and cayenne pepper. Flip corn kernels with a spatula as they cook, then stir in onion, bell pepper, and garlic, stirring every few minutes, until mixture begins to stick to the skillet.

Pour beer into the skillet to help unstick mixture; cook and stir until corn develops very dark spots and onion and bell pepper are soft, about 20 minutes. Remove from heat; sprinkle with chopped bacon, cotija cheese, and cilantro.

mexican-vegetarian-stuffed-peppers.name: Mexican Vegetarian Stuffed Peppers
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Bring a large pot of water and 1 tablespoon salt to a boil. Add green bell peppers and cook until slightly softened, 3 to 4 minutes. This will prevent the bell peppers from becoming crispy as they bake.
Drain bell peppers and arrange cut-side up in a 9x9-inch baking dish.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion; cook and stir until softened, 5 to 10 minutes.

Transfer cooked onion into a large bowl; add rice, black beans, and tomatoes. Stir in chili powder, garlic salt, cumin, and 1/2 teaspoon salt until well combined. Fold in 1 1/2 cups Mexican cheese blend.
Spoon rice mixture evenly into bell peppers; sprinkle with remaining Mexican cheese blend.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese is melted and bubbling, about 30 minutes.

microwave-apple-marmalade-teleculinaria.name: Microwave Apple Marmalade

ingredients.item: Oil for oil or vegetable paper

instructions: Peel and peel the apples, cut them into pieces and place them in a microwave container with lid. Take to the microwave, desicped, at maximum power for about 12 minutes (the apple should be soft but whole).
Place the apple in the blender, add the sugar and lemon juice and crush. Involve all right and go back to shredding.
Transfer the previous preparation back to the microwave container, place over the cap slightly tilted and turn on 20 minutes at maximum power.

Remove from the microwave and stir well to eliminate any bubbles. Lie in a container, oiled or lined with vegetable paper, and let it cool down and rest for at least 12 hours in the cold. Serve with toast.

microwave-cashew-brittle.name: Microwave Cashew Brittle
instructions: Lightly grease a baking sheet with 1 teaspoon butter.

Combine cashews, sugar, and corn syrup in a medium microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on high for 4 minutes. Stir; microwave 3 minutes more. Stir in 1 tablespoon butter, vanilla extract, and butter flavoring until combined. Microwave 2 minutes more.

Immediately add baking soda; stir and fold until mixture is fluffy. Working quickly, spread mixture evenly onto the prepared baking sheet; let sit until completely cooled. Break into pieces. Store in an airtight bag or container.

microwave-egg-breakfast-sandwich-with-ch.name: Microwave Egg Breakfast Sandwich With Cheddar And Avocado

ingredients.prep: flat-bottomed bowl or cup roughly the size of your sandwich.

instructions: Spray inside of bowl with nonstick spray or lightly coat with oil or butter. Add eggs, salt, pepper, and 1 Tbsp. water; mix with a fork until combined.

Microwave on high 30 seconds; you should see bits of solid egg floating in uncooked part. Stir gently (this will help egg cook evenly) and microwave again 30 seconds or until egg puffs up dramatically. Add cheese and continue to microwave until egg is just set and cheese is melted, 15–30 seconds. Using a small spatula, transfer egg mixture to bottom toast slice. Top with avocado, drizzle with hot sauce or pesto, then top with remaining toast slice. Serve immediately.

mixed-grain-and-coconut-porridge.name: Mixed Grain And Coconut Porridge

ingredients.item: Bee pollen and toasted unsweetened coconut flakes

instructions: Spoon 2 Tbsp. cream off the top of coconut milk into a small bowl. Whisk in a pinch of salt and set aside.

Bring grains, coconut flakes, maple syrup, a pinch of salt, remaining coconut milk, and 4 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until grains are chewy-tender and most of the liquid has been absorbed, about 1 hour.
Do Ahead: Porridge can be made 4 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

Bring raisins, maple syrup, salt, and 1 cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium heat. Cook until raisins are plump and about half of the water is evaporated, 12–15 minutes. Add tea bags and let raisin mixture cool.
Divide porridge among bowls and top with reserved coconut cream. Remove tea bags from raisins and spoon raisins and some of their syrup over porridge. Sprinkle with bee pollen and coconut flakes.
Do Ahead: Raisin mixture can be made 2 weeks ahead. Cover and chill.

mojiteas.name: Mojiteas
instructions: Place tea bags and mint sprigs into a large pitcher. Pour in boiling water; steep for 8 to 10 minutes. Remove tea bags and mint; before discarding, squeeze excess tea back into pitcher. Stir in sugar until dissolved; add orange juice and lemon juice. Pour in cold water and rum. Refrigerate at least 4 hours to overnight.

morning-glory-baked-oatmeal.name: Morning Glory Baked Oatmeal

ingredients.prep: plus more room temperature for pan

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 375°. Butter an 8x8" ovenproof baking dish. Whisk egg, orange zest, orange juice, milk, maple syrup, melted butter, vanilla, salt, cinnamon, and ginger in a large bowl to combine. Add old-fashioned oats, steel-cut oats, apple, carrot, raisins, baking powder, and ½ cup pecans and stir again to combine. Scrape into prepared baking dish and sprinkle more pecans on top.
Bake oatmeal until top is golden brown and has puffed up a bit, about 40 minutes. Let sit 5 minutes.

Serve warm with a drizzle of cream on top.
Do Ahead: Oatmeal can be baked 5 days ahead. Cover and chill. Reheat with a splash of milk before serving.

moroccan-carrot-soup.name: Moroccan Carrot Soup
instructions: Melt butter in large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add onion; sauté 2 minutes. Mix in carrots. Add broth; bring to boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until carrots are very tender, about 20 minutes.
Stir cumin seeds in small skillet over medium-high heat until fragrant, 4 to 5 minutes; cool. Finely grind in spice mill.
Remove soup from heat. Puree in batches in blender until smooth. Return to same pan. Whisk in honey, lemon juice, and allspice. Season with salt and pepper.
Ladle soup into bowls. Drizzle yogurt over; sprinkle generously with cumin.

moroccan-chicken-with-green-olives-and-l.name: Moroccan Chicken With Green Olives And Lemon
instructions: Cut 1 lemon into 8 wedges. Squeeze enough juice from second lemon to measure 2 tablespoons; set wedges and juice aside. Heat oil in large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and sprinkle with salt and pepper; sauté until golden brown, about 8 minutes. Add next 5 ingredients; stir 1 minute. Add broth; bring to boil. Sprinkle chicken with and pepper; add to skillet. Add lemon wedges. Cover, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer until chicken is cooked through, turning occasionally, 25 to 30 minutes. Transfer chicken to platter. Add olives and 2 tablespoons lemon juice to skillet. Increase heat to high; boil uncovered to thicken slightly, about 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Pour over chicken.

mortadella-appetizer.name: Mortadella Appetizer

ingredients.prep: halved or quartered if very large

instructions: Holding a bread knife parallel to a cutting board, slice focaccia in half. Spread cut sides with mayonnaise and cut each half into 2" squares. Working one at a time, drape mortadella onto squares, top with peperoncini, and secure with skewers.

mosaic-trunk-with-couverture-argiro.name: Mosaic Trunk With Couverture

ingredients.item: 1 cup of roasted and grated almonds
1 cup of roasted and grated almonds

instructions: Break the cookies into thick pieces in a bowl and sprinkle them with milk.
In another bowl, add the butter and powder sugar.
With a hand mixer we will mix them until the mixture is white for about 5 minutes.
Add the fresh eggs, cocoa, melted couverture and cognac.
Add the nuts and mix with a spatula.
Add the mixture to the biscuits and mix.
Dress with a membrane or with a parchment paper a long cake form.
Pour the trunk into the pan and freeze it in the refrigerator until it thickens.

multi-grain-pasta-with-butternut-squash-.name: Multi-grain Pasta With Butternut Squash, Ground Lamb, And Kasseri

ingredients.item: -ounce packages fresh peeled cubed butternut squash
Canned crushed tomatoes with added puree

instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C. Toss squash with 11/2 tablespoons oil in large bowl. Sprinkle generously with salt and pepper. Transfer squash to large rimmed baking sheet. Roast until tender and brown around edges, using metal spatula to turn occasionally, 30 to 35 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside.

Heat 1 tablespoon oil in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add lamb and onions; sauté until lamb browns and onions soften, 7 to 8 minutes. Add garlic and next 3 ingredients; stir 1 minute. Stir in tomatoes, then broth and bring to boil, scraping up any browned bits. Reduce heat; simmer until mixture thickens, about 5 minutes. Stir in squash. Season with salt and pepper.

Cook pasta in large pot of boiling salted water until just tender but still firm to bite, stirring occasionally. Drain, reserving 1 cup cooking liquid. Return pasta to pot. Add lamb mixture, half of cilantro, and half of cheese; toss. Add reserved cooking liquid by 1/3 cupfuls to moisten. Season with salt and pepper. Transfer pasta to bowl. Sprinkle with remaining cilantro and cheese.

murgh-makhani-indian-butter-chicken.name: Murgh Makhani (indian Butter Chicken)
instructions: Stir yogurt and tandoori masala powder in a large bowl until combined; add chicken and toss to coat. Marinate in the refrigerator for 1 hour. Drain and discard excess marinade.
Puree onion, ginger, water, and garlic in a blender until it forms a smooth paste; set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add chicken and cook until lightly brown, about 5 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.

Heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in the same skillet. Fry onion paste until moisture is mostly evaporated, about 3 minutes. Sprinkle garam masala and chili powder over mixture; cook for 1 minute more. Add tomato sauce, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook another 5 minutes.

Return chicken to the skillet. Add half-and-half and bring to a boil. Add butter, fenugreek leaves, and salt; reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, until chicken is no longer pink in the middle, 15 to 20 minutes.

instructions: Warm a tablespoon of olive oil in a big frying pan with medium heat. Add onion and garlic, and pits till they are golden.
Add mushrooms and cook them till they are tender and golden. Then add the spinach and cook till they leave.
Add Arborio rice to frying pan and stir to impregnate with flavors.
If you're using white wine, pour it into the frying pan and remove them till they evaporate.
It starts to add the vegetable stock, one cup at a time, and scrambles constantly until absorbed. Repeat this process until the rice is cooked and has a creamy texture.
Remove frying pan from the fire and add parmesan and butter. Revels till they melt and mix well.

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
King trumpet or crimini (baby bella) mushrooms

ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced into rings on a mandoline

instructions: Whisk vinegar, Dijon mustard, and honey in a medium bowl. Gradually whisk in grapeseed oil until emulsified. Season with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD: Vinaigrette can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

Combine breadcrumbs and olive oil in a small skillet over medium-high heat. Cook, stirring frequently, until breadcrumbs are golden brown, 4-5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper and transfer to a paper towel-lined plate; let cool. DO AHEAD: Breadcrumbs can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.
Combine mushrooms, onion, watercress, and vinaigrette in a large bowl and toss to coat. Divide among plates; sprinkle with breadcrumbs.

mushroom-ragout-argiro.name: Mushroom Ragout
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pot first and sauté the chopped onion, Carrot and leek.
Leave them in medium to strong heat until they become transparent and polished, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the whole garlic cloves, thyme and mushrooms.
Leave them on high fire for 3-4 minutes to drink all their liquids.
Sprinkle with flour and mix the flour for 2 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and put the wine out.
Pour some hot water, about 2 cups, barely half-covering the ingredients.
Salt and pepper.
Simmer for 15'-20', until the sauce thickens and thickens.
In the end, add the chopped nut.
Sprinkle a little chopped parsley at the end of the boil.
Serve with pasta or taliatelles and grated cheese, sprinkle with some olive oil each dish.
Alternatively, serve with boiled rice. If you are fasting, skip the cheese.

mushroom-tofu-and-noodle-stir-fry.name: Mushroom, Tofu, And Noodle Stir-fry
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Combine water, liquid soy seasoning, arrowroot, ginger, and garlic in a jar. Set glaze aside.'}

{'step': '2', 'description': 'Line a plate with paper towels, set tofu on top, and add another layer of paper towels. Place a cutting board on top of the tofu and set a heavy pot on the board. Let sit for 30 minutes, replacing the paper towels as needed, to press as much liquid as possible from the tofu.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Place rice noodles into a large bowl, cover with cold water, and soak. Cut pressed tofu into 1/2-inch pieces.'}

{'step': '4', 'description': 'Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Add tofu and stir-fry until all sides are golden, about 5 minutes. Add all mushrooms and cook for 2 minutes. Mix in bell pepper and onion, and stir-fry for 2 minutes. Pour glaze on top and cook until sauce has thickened, about 2 minutes.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Remove rice noodles from water, shake off excess liquid, and add to the wok. Stir-fry until heated thorough, about 3 minutes.'}

mustard-potato-salad.name: Mustard Potato Salad
instructions: Place potatoes into a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until fork-tender, about 20 minutes. Drain.

Transfer potatoes to a bowl and blend with an electric mixer. Add mayonnaise, onion, mustard, milk, butter, pickle juice, salt, pepper, and 1/2 teaspoon paprika; blend until smooth. Blend in pickles. Dice 5 eggs and blend into the mixture. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
Transfer to a serving bowl and smooth the top with a rubber spatula. Slice the remaining egg in half lengthwise and press on top. Garnish with paprika.
